title: Open the platform overview and enter the fan dashboard
description: This verifies that a visitor can understand the landing page and reach the fan dashboard from the main entry point.

steps.description: Click the entry point for the fan dashboard
Verify the fan dashboard is displayed
Verify personalized fan content is shown

title: Use the landing page to enter the infrastructure hub
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the home page to navigate into the infrastructure module.

steps.description: Click the entry point for the infrastructure portal
Verify the infrastructure hub is displayed

title: Open infrastructure hub and review system health
description: This verifies that a user can open the infrastructure hub, see its monitoring overview, and reach a key sub-module from the hub.

steps.description: Verify infrastructure KPI widgets are displayed
Verify system status information is displayed
Click the link to open the energy module
Verify the energy monitoring page is displayed

title: Use the landing page to enter the operations hub
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the home page to navigate into the operations module.

steps.description: Click the entry point for the operations portal
Verify the operations hub is displayed

title: Sign in with valid email and password
description: This verifies that a user can complete email and password sign in and reach the account area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify access to the account area is shown

title: Preserve ticket browsing across common fan entry points
description: This test verifies that a fan can reach the ticket area from the home module navigation and complete a basic ticket review journey.

title: View loaded live match and ticket summaries on the fan dashboard
description: This verifies that the fan dashboard loads its match and ticket content after the initial loading state.

steps.description: Verify live match cards are displayed

title: View ticket options and details
description: This test verifies that a fan can open the ticket area, review ticket options, and inspect ticket details end to end.

title: Create an account with email and password
description: This verifies that a user can complete registration with email and password and see a confirmation of account creation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify account creation confirmation is visible

title: Review live match statistics and event tracking
description: Verifies that a user can open match center and review live statistics together with event tracking updates for the current match.

steps.description: Verify live match statistics are displayed
Verify event tracking updates are displayed

title: View AI insights and open a related AI module from the command center
description: This verifies that a user can review AI recommendations on the command center dashboard and navigate to a related AI view.

steps.description: Verify a related AI module is displayed

title: Open ticket management from the fan dashboard
description: This verifies that a fan can continue from the dashboard into ticket management.

steps.description: Click the ticket management entry point
Verify the ticket management page is displayed

title: Find stadium facilities from the navigation map
description: A fan can open stadium navigation, view the map, locate a facility, and see route guidance to continue inside the venue.

steps.description: Verify the stadium map is displayed
Locate a facility on the map

title: Open energy monitoring from the infrastructure hub
description: This verifies that a user can move from the infrastructure hub into energy monitoring and see energy data.

steps.description: Click the link to open the energy module

Verify energy consumption information is displayed

title: Explore the AI hub and reach the executive dashboard

steps.description: Click the executive dashboard entry point

title: Proceed through ticket purchase flow
description: This test verifies that a fan can select a ticket option and continue into the purchase or reservation flow.

steps.description: Proceed with the purchase or reservation flow
Verify the next step in the ticket flow is displayed

title: Open the AI platform and reach the command center

description: This verifies that a user can move from the AI hub into the command center dashboard.
